title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 336.060 - Licenses to be issued, when
text:
336.060.  Licenses to be issued, when. — Whenever the provisions of this chapter have been complied with, and upon payment of the license fee, the board shall issue a license as an optometrist.
(RSMo 1939 § 10118, A.L. 1981 S.B. 16, A.L. 2007 H.B. 780 merged with S.B. 308) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 13506
